original_statement: at most how many states have the democrats won?
mutated_statement: at most how many states has a party both won and lost?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Predicate addition + Number agreement change + Semantic scope shift: "the democrats" → "a party" (specific → generic) | "won" → "both won and lost" (adds contradictory loss condition) | "have" → "has" (plural → singular) | scope: counting wins → counting states a party both won and lost (wins count → contradictory win+loss count)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与chain记录（iteration 2的judge_thought与chain中明确写到“Each row… no state displays a case where the same party both won and lost… Therefore…0”），Agent并未请求澄清或直接报错，而是通过检查表中数据并用逻辑说明矛盾在给定数据下无法成立，进而给出答案0。尽管中途有对不被允许函数(simple_query)使用的critic指出（iteration 1/2的critique指示函数使用错误），Agent在后续迭代改为基于数据语义进行推理并合理化矛盾指令：说明矛盾条件在现实/数据内不存在，从而以事实为依据解释并解决矛盾。该行为符合“通过数据查询/逻辑推理主动解释矛盾并合理化”的定义，因此归类为“逻辑解释合理化”。
